description: AC-1/AC-2: a detected collision quarantines into a workspace case with source ids, matching and conflicting fields, confidence, contact risk, and pending operations; staff resolve with approved evidence — link and merge decisions are attributed, reversible, aliases preserved.

cases.name: AC-1: a collision opens a quarantined case carrying the full workspace surface, with no automatic merge
AC-2: staff verify with approved evidence — the link decision is attributed

resolution.reason: synthetic identity verified against license evidence

cases.name: AC-2: a merge decision is attributed and reversible — lineage per artifact, all aliases preserved
